summary: Completed frontend testing of fleet management application with individual tool pages. Login works, sidebar navigation works, all 3 tools function correctly as separate pages. Found one critical issue: 'Tools' link still present in top navbar.

ui_bugs.issue: Tools link still present in top navbar (should be removed per requirements)
ui_bugs.details: The Tools link appears in the top navigation bar and redirects to homepage instead of expected /fuel-surcharge route. Per requirements, only BOL Generator and Tools should be removed from top navbar, keeping only Product, Use Cases, About, Contact.

passed_tests: Top navbar shows correct links: Product, Use Cases, About, Contact (BOL Generator correctly removed)
Sidebar displays all 3 tools when authenticated: BOL Generator, Fuel Surcharge Calculator, IFTA Tax Calculator
Sidebar has Tools and History tabs
BOL Generator page loads individually and form inputs work
Fuel Surcharge Calculator page loads individually and calculations work
IFTA Calculator page loads individually and calculations work
Sidebar navigation between all 3 tools works correctly
Each tool shows individually (not all together as required)
User authentication state persists across tool navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Remove 'Tools' link from top navbar in Navbar.tsx component. The Tools link should only appear in the sidebar, not in the top navigation bar. All other requirements are working correctly.
